target.title: fix(anthropic): stop default Claude permission bypass
target.body:
## Summary

- Stop defaulting Claude CLI live runs to `--permission-mode bypassPermissions`; OpenClaw now requests that mode only when an explicit exec policy resolves to full access with asks disabled.
- Honor session-scoped `/exec` policy before gating Claude bypass: session `security` and `ask` override config for the current session, while approval-file constraints still apply afterward.
- Strip raw Claude backend `--permission-mode` args in live `claude-stdio` launches unless explicit OpenClaw YOLO policy enables bypass, and keep docs aligned across gateway/backend and exec-approval references.

## Verification

Commands run at PR head `a2e0526b95e2e91cfebe62bc8856fe939d505bf7`:

- `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs run src/agents/cli-runner.spawn.test.ts src/agents/cli-backends.test.ts extensions/anthropic/cli-shared.test.ts`
- `env OPENCLAW_VITEST_INCLUDE_FILE=/private/tmp/openclaw-agent-channel-include.json OPENCLAW_TEST_PROJECTS_PARALLEL=2 OPENCLAW_VITEST_MAX_WORKERS=2 OPENCLAW_VITEST_SHARD_NAME=agentic-commands-agent-channel node scripts/test-projects.mjs test/vitest/vitest.commands.config.ts`
- `env OPENCLAW_VITEST_NO_OUTPUT_TIMEOUT_MS=300000 node scripts/run-vitest.mjs run --config test/vitest/vitest.agents-core.config.ts`
- `git diff --check`
- `pnpm check`
- `pnpm build`
- `pnpm test` (latest full run passed all 88 Vitest shards in 713.39s)

## Real behavior proof

- Behavior or issue addressed: Claude live-session argv generation no longer injects `--permission-mode bypassPermissions` by default, raw backend `--permission-mode` values cannot leak through the live path without explicit OpenClaw YOLO policy, and session-scoped `/exec security=full ask=off` is honored before the bypass gate.
- Real environment tested: Local OpenClaw source checkout at PR head `a2e0526b95e2e91cfebe62bc8856fe939d505bf7`.
- Exact steps or command run after this patch: `node --import tsx /private/tmp/openclaw-claude-live-proof.mjs`
- Proof method: the script creates a temporary executable backend named `claude`, calls `executePreparedCliRun`, and captures the argv received by the real OpenClaw process-supervisor subprocess launch path. No fake supervisor is used, and no external Claude process or secret is required.

- Evidence after fix (screenshot, recording, terminal capture, console output, redacted runtime log, linked artifact, or copied live output): copied terminal output from the real subprocess-supervisor wrapper proof:

```text
proof=subprocess-supervisor-wrapper root=/var/folders/vl/sf78gplx54d8dmfv_gz9tcd40000gn/T/openclaw-claude-live-proof-W4v8OS
default-no-config: permissionMode=<omitted>
default-no-config: argv=["-p","--model","sonnet","--append-system-prompt-file","/private/tmp/openclaw/openclaw-cli-system-prompt-ABVuLl/system-prompt.md","--input-format","stream-json","--output-format","stream-json","--permission-prompt-tool","stdio","--replay-user-messages"]
raw-bypass-no-config: permissionMode=<omitted>
raw-bypass-no-config: argv=["-p","--model","sonnet","--append-system-prompt-file","/private/tmp/openclaw/openclaw-cli-system-prompt-aLVTiu/system-prompt.md","--input-format","stream-json","--output-format","stream-json","--permission-prompt-tool","stdio","--replay-user-messages"]
session-yolo-overrides-config: permissionMode=bypassPermissions
session-yolo-overrides-config: argv=["-p","--model","sonnet","--append-system-prompt-file","/private/tmp/openclaw/openclaw-cli-system-prompt-Ko93kk/system-prompt.md","--input-format","stream-json","--output-format","stream-json","--permission-prompt-tool","stdio","--replay-user-messages","--permission-mode","bypassPermissions"]
session-deny-strips-raw-bypass: permissionMode=<omitted>
session-deny-strips-raw-bypass: argv=["-p","--model","sonnet","--append-system-prompt-file","/private/tmp/openclaw/openclaw-cli-system-prompt-KAu214/system-prompt.md","--input-format","stream-json","--output-format","stream-json","--permission-prompt-tool","stdio","--replay-user-messages"]
```

- Observed result after fix: Missing config leaves Claude permission mode unset; a raw backend `--permission-mode bypassPermissions` is stripped with no explicit exec policy; session `/exec security=full ask=off` overrides restrictive config and adds `bypassPermissions`; session `security=deny` strips raw bypass.
- What was not tested: A live Claude model/API request was not sent from this machine.
- Proof limitations or environment constraints: The proof uses a local temporary executable wrapper to avoid invoking external Claude or exposing secrets while still exercising OpenClaw's actual subprocess launch path.
target.author: plgonzalezrx8
